phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Foro Italico promenade is
phrases.cultural_note: The Foro Italico is Palermo's seafront public park, recently restored after decades of neglect, popular with locals for evening walks.

responses.english: Head to the sea from the Oreto river, it's right there.
responses.phonetic: SHEN-dah VER-soh eel MAH-reh dal-loh-REH-toh, eh lee dee FRON-teh.
responses.french: Scenda verso il mare dall'Oreto, è lì di fronte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if you can swim at this waterfront
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si può fare il bagno al Foro Italico?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see PWOH FAH-reh eel BAHN-yoh al FOH-roh ee-TAH-lee-koh?

responses.english: No, you need to go to Addaura or Mondello.
responses.phonetic: no, bee-ZON-yah an-DAH-reh ah ad-DAH-oo-rah oh mon-DEL-loh.
responses.french: No, bisogna andare ad Addaura o Mondello.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how far Mondello beach is from here
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto è lontana la spiaggia di Mondello?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh eh lon-TAH-nah lah SPYAD-jah dee mon-DEL-loh?

responses.english: About twelve kilometres, half an hour by bus.
responses.phonetic: CHEER-kah doh-DEE-chee kee-loh-MEH-tree, met-ZOH-rah een ow-toh-BOOS.
responses.french: Circa dodici chilometri, mezz'ora in autobus.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to watch the sunset over the sea
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si vede bene il tramonto dal waterfront?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see VEH-deh BEH-neh eel trah-MON-toh dal waterfront?

responses.english: At the northern end of the promenade, unobstructed view.
responses.phonetic: al-les-treh-mee-TAH nord del VYAH-leh, VEES-tah LEE-beh-rah.
responses.french: All'estremità nord del viale, vista libera.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which bus connects the waterfront to the centre
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quale autobus collega il Foro Italico al centro?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAH-leh ow-toh-BOOS kol-LEH-gah eel FOH-roh ee-TAH-lee-koh al CHEN-troh?

responses.english: The 105, stop right here in front.
responses.phonetic: eel chen-toh-CHEEN-kweh, fer-MAH-tah PROH-pryoh kwee dee FRON-teh.
responses.french: Il 105, fermata proprio qui di fronte.
